seoTitle: Willson River vs Willunga Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willson River and Willunga Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Willson River vs Willunga Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willson River and Willunga Hill.
heading: Willson River vs Willunga Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willson River, South Australia and Willunga Hill, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willunga Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Willson River (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willson River or Willunga Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willson River has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Willunga Hill scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willson River scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Willunga Hill scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willson River or Willunga Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willunga Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
